_doc: CLI coding-agent registry — read by BOTH the in-container wrapper (run.sh) and the host dispatcher (scripts/cli-agent-dispatcher.sh). mode:'local' = binary runs inside the openclaw container. mode:'remote' = task is filed to workspace/.cli-tasks/ and executed HOST-SIDE where the subscription lives — subscription credentials NEVER enter tenant containers (Mike, 2026-07-11). Adding a CLI = add an entry (+ binary in image if local / host install if remote) and flip enabled. Tenant-local overrides merge from ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cli-agents-local.json (same shape, only overridden keys). BILLING RULE: LLM CLIs are ALWAYS subscription-billed, never per-call API keys.

z-code.use_for: default for all heavy coding: canvas pages, games, dashboards, multi-file edits, 100+ line files

claude-code.provider: Anthropic subscription, host-run (5h cap shared with host ops — dispatcher enforces one-at-a-time)
claude-code.use_for: hardest coding/review — escalation tier when z-code output isn't good enough, or when the user asks for Claude by name
claude-code._note: --model pin is MANDATORY (account default = opus). Runs host-side in the tenant's workspace dir; credentials never enter the container.

opencode._note: Stub — verify CLI syntax + provider when installed, then flip enabled.
